name: English Parsley Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Gradually add flour, stirring constantly until smooth.
3. Slowly pour in milk while continuing to stir.
4. Cook the mixture over low heat until it thickens.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Just before serving, stir in chopped parsley and finely chopped hard boiled eggs.
7. Sprinkle a pinch of nutmeg on top.
This sauce pairs well with salmon, chicken, boiled potatoes, and vegetables.
